name: devloop
description: Cross-CLI plugin marketplace for developer-efficiency workflows. devloop is the first real plugin; example is a placeholder for the multi-plugin intent.

plugins.name: devloop
plugins.description: Dev-loop workflow, native-first rebuild built on native Claude Code events (CwdChanged / PostCompact / FileChanged / monitors): git/PR (GitHub + GitLab) + cwd-aware enter + lint/test gates + .devloop/context.json state layer auto-injected into every prompt.

plugins.name: example
plugins.description: Placeholder plugin demonstrating that the devloop marketplace hosts multiple plugins. Provides a trivial /hello command.
